---
title: "About"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This project was developed by **Gavin Caldwell** For [INFO 526 - Data Analysis and Visualization](https://datavizaz.org/) at the University of Arizona, taught by Dr. Greg Chism. The team is comprised of the following team members:

- Gavin Caldwell: Graduate student in the College of Engineering pursuing an M.S. in Electrical and Computer Engineering
